steps.title: Factor and apply absolute value property
steps.content:
Recognize that $4x - 4 = 4(x-1)$:
$$|4(x-1)| = 112$$
Apply the property for absolute values to get:
$$4|x-1| = 112$$

steps.title: Identify the positive solution
steps.content: From $|x-1| = 28$, we have two cases: $x - 1 = 28$ or $x - 1 = -28$. The positive value of $x - 1$ is $28$.
